36036775.fa: Allyson G. Hall, PhD, is an Associate Editor of JHQ and Professor in the Department of Health Services Administration at the University of Alabama at Birmingham (UAB). She also serves as a co-director of UAB's Center for Outcomes and Effectiveness Research and Education (COERE). Dr. Hall's research focuses on access to and the quality of care for underserved populations
